findings.description: The handwritten/cursive signature image of Elizabeth S. Werner visible on PDF page 1 (between the 'From:' line and the digital signature text block) has no corresponding tag in the HTML. Signatures are substantive images.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a cursive signature reading approximately 'Elizabeth S Werner'. The HTML contains only two tags: one for the NC DEQ logo and one for a decorative footer element. No for the signature.
